issues.description: Missing required condition: LeaderIsName 'Nico Robin'. Current condition is 'Always' but effect requires leader check.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Effect specifies: look at 3 cards, reveal up to 1 card with [Trigger] keyword, add to hand, then place rest at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL lacks the complex multi-step logic with card filtering by keyword and deck ordering.
Filter must specify HasKeyword 'Trigger', not 'Any'. Effect explicitly searches for cards with [Trigger] keyword.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader is [Nico Robin], look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a [Trigger] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
